creator: oh@fixmbr.de
text:
x11/slim doesn't adhere keymap configuration, so it's not possible to use German umlauts in X while starting with slim (via slim_enable in rc.conf).

How-To-Repeat: -install slim
-enable it in /etc/rc.conf with slim_enable="YES"
-try to use any umlauts, even locale shows "C" only
